data.description:

data.title: China Gingko Education Group Schedules Board Meeting to Approve Financial Results
data.description:
China Gingko Education Group Co., Ltd. ( (HK:1851) ) has issued an announcement.

China Gingko Education Group Co., Ltd. has announced that its board of directors will meet on March 28, 2025, to consider and approve the audited consolidated financial results for the year ended December 31, 2024. The meeting will also discuss the recommendation of a final dividend payment, which could impact the company’s financial strategy and shareholder returns.

More about China Gingko Education Group Co., Ltd.

China Gingko Education Group Co., Ltd. operates in the education industry, focusing on providing educational services. The company is incorporated in the Cayman Islands and is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange.

data.title: Magellan Aerospace Reports Strong Q4 2024 Financial Results
data.description:
Magellan Aerospace ( (TSE:MAL) ) just unveiled an update.

Magellan Aerospace Corporation reported a strong financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2024, with revenues increasing by 7.7% to CAD 240.7 million and a significant rise in net income to CAD 15.9 million. The company’s gross profit and adjusted EBITDA also saw substantial growth, reflecting improved operational efficiency and profitability. This financial success underscores Magellan’s robust position in the aerospace industry and its ability to capitalize on market opportunities, benefiting stakeholders and enhancing its competitive edge.

More about Magellan Aerospace

Magellan Aerospace Corporation is a diversified supplier of components to the aerospace industry. It designs, engineers, and manufactures aeroengine and aerostructure components for aerospace markets, including advanced products for defense and space markets, and complementary specialty products. The company also supports the aftermarket through the supply of spare parts and performing repair and overhaul services.

data.title: G50 Corp Advances Drilling at Golconda Project, Arizona
data.description:
An announcement from Gold 50 Ltd. ( (AU:G50) ) is now available.

G50 Corp Limited has commenced Phase 2 of its RC drilling program at the Golconda Project in Arizona, following up on high-grade discoveries of gallium, gold, and silver made in 2023. This drilling aims to expand the understanding of the mineralization’s depth and strike extent and explore new targets. The project is strategically located in a region with significant interest due to geopolitical and commercial demands, positioning G50 Corp as a potential contributor to the Western world’s strategic material supply needs.

More about Gold 50 Ltd.

G50 Corp Limited is a company operating in the mining industry, focusing on strategic and precious metals. The company is engaged in exploration activities, particularly in Arizona, where it aims to secure a supply of strategic materials for defense and energy technologies.

YTD Price Performance: -18.75%

Average Trading Volume: 201,516

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

data.title: Syntara Limited Announces Director’s Interest Change
data.description:
Pharmaxis Ltd ( (AU:SNT) ) has shared an update.

Syntara Limited has announced a change in the director’s interest notice, specifically involving Waradana Malitha Hashan De Silva, who is a managing partner of the manager of the KP Rx Healthcare Trust. The trust, through AMAL Security Services Pty Ltd, acquired 9,753,442 ordinary shares at $0.06 per share, increasing the total shares held indirectly by the trust to 63,324,871. This acquisition was part of a placement of ordinary shares approved by shareholders, potentially impacting the company’s market positioning by increasing its shareholding structure.

data.title: AIA Group Reports Strong 2024 Financial Results with New Share Buy-Back Program
data.description:
AIA Group ( (HK:1299) ) just unveiled an announcement.

AIA Group Limited reported strong financial results for the year ending December 31, 2024, with significant growth in key metrics. The company achieved an 18% increase in the value of new business, a 12% rise in operating profit after tax per share, and a 10% increase in underlying free surplus generation per share. Additionally, AIA announced a new share buy-back program worth US$1.6 billion, reflecting its robust capital management strategy and commitment to returning value to shareholders.

More about AIA Group

AIA Group Limited is a leading insurance company incorporated in Hong Kong, offering a range of financial services and products, primarily focusing on life insurance and related services across Asia-Pacific markets.

data.title: Banco Comercial Português Issues €500 Million Tier 2 Notes
data.description:
Banco Comercial Portugues ( (GB:0RJN) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Banco Comercial Português, S.A. has announced the issuance of €500 million in subordinated Tier 2 Notes under its Euro Note Programme. This strategic move, aimed at strengthening its capital base, involves a 12-year tenor with an option for early redemption and an attractive interest rate, highlighting the bank’s successful engagement with institutional investors.

More about Banco Comercial Portugues

Banco Comercial Português, S.A. operates in the financial services industry, primarily offering banking products and services. It focuses on providing a wide range of financial solutions to both individual and institutional clients.

data.title: Unibail-Rodamco-Westfield SE Announces Executive Share Vesting and Stock Options
data.description:
An announcement from Unibail-Rodamco-Westfield SE Stapled Security Chess Depository Interests Repr 0.05 Sh ( (AU:URW) ) is now available.

Unibail-Rodamco-Westfield SE has announced that 5,896 stapled shares were vested to Mr. Bruno Donjon de Saint Martin, the Chief Operating Officer for Southern Europe, as part of a Long Term Incentive Plan initiated in 2022.
